state.next-action: Resolved the next composer cleanup pass: reserved non-CMS frontend routes no longer expose the composer, the leftover custom `_contact` page was removed so `/contact` belongs to the CMS page model again, and the Block data tab now supports `Find blocks`, `Add below`, and `Remove block` from the selected-block panel. Resume `18-06` for shared-sections work, with supporting notes in `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-layout-first-page-model-hero-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-instant-quote-app-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-composer-media-target-model.md`, and `.planning/todos/2026-04-08-cms-route-gating-and-block-actions.md`.
